business_ideas.idea: Cana.com: molecular beverage printer that dispenses any drink from 80 chemical compounds and water
Permissionless beverage brand platform: creators launch custom drink brands without inventory or capital
Teleboom.com / InPhoneServices: aggregate all telecom services (cell, long-distance) on one website
Konga.com: online Q&A research marketplace where experts answer for-pay questions

predictions.text: Decentralized beverage manufacturing cuts 600L water per liter wine to near-zero environmental impact
Gen 3 beverage printer will reach mass-market price point and become household appliance
